body: Please perform Round 7 re-audit after remediation patches applied.

_lane_worker.detail: Missing required field: schema_version; Missing required field: task_id; Missing required field: idempotency_key; Missing required field: subject; Missing required field: payload; Missing required field: execution; Missing required field: lease; Missing required field: retry; Missing required field: evidence; Missing required field: evidence_exchange; Missing required field: heartbeat; Field "type" value "request" not in allowed values: task, response, heartbeat, escalation, handoff, ack, alert, notification, status
